payload.title: Fan-out bus via Postgres LISTEN/NOTIFY (pluggable)
payload.description: Replace the in-process EventEmitter in src/events.js with a pluggable bus interface (publish(topic, seq)/subscribe(topic, cb)) backed by Postgres LISTEN/NOTIFY. On append (SCP-124), NOTIFY a tenant:seq pointer in the same transaction; each node holds one LISTEN connection and fans out to local SSE subscribers, reading missed rows by cursor. Thin interface so NATS can swap in later. Depends on SCP-124. (From SCP-125.)
